case_title: SEYMOUR SEIDSCHER VS. CHARLENE W. WOAH

STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM LARRY BECKER. FILED BY SEIDSCHER, SEYMOUR
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR SMALL CLAIMS HEARING HEARING SET FOR OCT-11-2011 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-11-2011 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SEIDSCHER, SEYMOUR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WEAH, CHARLENE W. $993.96 PRINCIPAL, $65.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,058.96 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT WEAH, CHARLENE W.
FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE ANNE-CHRISTINE MASSULLO ON 05/29/2024 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153.
